channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇸⚖️ US Official Says Iran Ceasefire Terminated Hostilities for War Powers Deadline
item.description: A senior Trump administration official declared that the US-Iran ceasefire that began in early April has terminated hostilities for the purposes of the congressional war powers deadline, which passed at midnight Thursday.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇩🇪 Trump Criticizes German Chancellor Merz, Tells Him to Stop Interfering on Iran
item.description: President Trump attacked German Chancellor Friedrich Merz, saying he was "doing a terrible job" and should spend less time interfering with Washingtons effort to tackle the Iran nuclear threat.

item.title: 🇮🇹🚢 Italy Condemns Israel Interception of Gaza Aid Flotilla as Unlawful
item.description: Italys government condemned Israels seizure of aid ships bound for Gaza and demanded the immediate release of all Italians who have been unlawfully detained, Prime Minister Giorgia Melonis office said.

item.title: 🇪🇺🌎 EU-Mercosur Trade Deal Takes Provisional Effect After Years of Negotiations
item.description: The long-awaited trade deal between the South American bloc Mercosur and the European Union has taken provisional effect, marking one of the largest trade agreements ever concluded.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 China and US Economic Chiefs Hold Candid Talks Ahead of Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: Top US and Chinese economic officials held candid talks ahead of a meeting set for May between President Trump and President Xi Jinping, with both sides raising complaints about trade policies.

item.title: 🇦🇺🌾 Australia's Farmers Hit by Fertilizer Crisis as Iran War Chokes Hormuz Trade
item.description: Australian farmers face soaring fertilizer costs and supply disruptions as the Iran-US conflict blocks shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, threatening crop yields and livestock production.

item.title: 🇧🇷 Brazil Congress Slashes Bolsonaro's Prison Term in Major Blow to Lula
item.description: Brazil's Congress overrode President Lula's veto, dramatically reducing former president Bolsonaro's sentence from 27 years to just over 2 years, with lawmakers chanting 'freedom' in celebration.

item.title: 🇮🇶🇺🇸 Trump Invites Iraq's PM-Designate to Washington After Productive Call
item.description: President Trump spoke with Iraq's newly designated Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi, inviting him to visit Washington and hailing a 'tremendous new chapter' in US-Iraq relations.

item.title: 🌍 China Eliminates Tariffs for All But One African Nation
item.description: Beijing's new zero-tariff regime covers nearly all African countries, boosting Chinese soft power on the continent but raising questions about uneven economic benefits and resource extraction dynamics.

item.title: 🛢️ Trump Approves Major New Canada-US Oil Pipeline Project
item.description: The president gave authorization for a significant cross-border oil pipeline connecting Canadian production to US refineries, a move aimed at bolstering North American energy security amid global supply disruptions.

item.title: 🇲🇲 Myanmar Junta Moves Aung San Suu Kyi to House Arrest
item.description: Myanmar's military government shortened ousted leader Aung San Suu Kyi's prison sentence, moving her from prison to house arrest in a rare concession amid international pressure.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Warns of More Yen Intervention After First Action in Two Years
item.description: Japan intervened to prop up the yen for the first time in nearly two years, and its top currency diplomat warned that speculation remains rife, signaling Tokyo stands ready to step in again.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Questions US Role as Global Mediator Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: Senior Russian security official Dmitry Medvedev said the United States is unlikely to serve as an effective mediator in international conflicts given its actions, casting doubt on Washington's diplomatic role.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC+ to Continue After UAE Exit, Russia Says No Price War Expected
item.description: Russia's Deputy Prime Minister Alexander Novak said OPEC+ will continue working together despite the UAE's departure, dismissing concerns about a potential price war.

item.title: ⚽ Iran Will Play at World Cup in US, FIFA Chief Confirms
item.description: FIFA President Gianni Infantino confirmed Iran will participate in the 2026 World Cup matches hosted in the United States, despite ongoing tensions between Tehran and Washington.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Top US general confirms Russia is aiding Iran in war against United States
item.description: Joint Chiefs Chairman Gen. Dan Caine told the Senate Armed Services Committee that Russia is "definitely" acting to support Iran, though he declined to provide details in the public hearing.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇯🇵 China warns UN of Japanese nuclear breakout as regional row escalates
item.description: Beijing has asked the international body to prioritize Tokyo's "dangerous tendency to seek nuclear weapons" amid escalating regional tensions over defense policies.

item.title: 🇨🇳🛰️ China to double Tiangong space station size as NASA phases out ISS
item.description: Plans are under way to add three more modules to the Chinese space station, though no timeline has been released for completing the expansion.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇩🇿 Russian shadow airlines use Algeria as base for secretive missions
item.description: Algeria has become a key customer for Russian arms at a time when Moscow has seen a slump in its military-export business after the invasion of Ukraine.

item.title: ⚖️ US-Iran War Deadline Passes as 60-Day War Powers Mark Arrives
item.description: The May 1 deadline under the War Powers Resolution has arrived with no resolution in sight for the US-Iran conflict, as the administration faces questions about congressional authorization.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Economic Collapse May Come Too Late for Trump
item.description: Weeks of conflict have exacerbated Iran economic woes, but the Islamic Republic appears able to survive a Gulf standoff despite a US blockade cutting off energy exports.

item.title: 🇪🇺 ECB Rate Hike Bets Tempered by Iran War Economic Impact
item.description: European Central Bank policymakers are weighing inflation risks against growth hits from higher energy prices as traders reduce bets on multiple rate hikes this year.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Intervenes to Prop Up Yen Against Dollar
item.description: Japan intervened in currency markets to support the embattled yen from near two-year lows against the dollar, marking a significant move amid global economic uncertainty.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU to Remove Leather From Anti-Deforestation Law
item.description: The European Commission will exclude leather imports from its anti-deforestation regulation after industry pressure argued that production does not incentivize cattle farming driving forest destruction.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Seeks Clarity from US on Russian Ceasefire Proposal
item.description: Ukraine will ask the Trump administration for clarification on a Russian proposal for a brief ceasefire, as diplomatic efforts continue amid the ongoing conflict.
